content.title: Beyond Siri: Here are the practical AI features coming to your iPhone in iOS 27
content.summary: TechCrunch details the practical Apple Intelligence features coming to iOS 27 beyond the overhauled Siri, including AI bill splitting, automated password updates, one-tap message suggestions, call context, vibe-coded Shortcuts, and intelligent Safari tab organization.
content.summary_1: While Apple's revamped Siri dominated WWDC 2026 headlines, iOS 27 is packed with smaller but highly practical AI features powered by Apple Intelligence. TechCrunch highlights key features now in developer beta: AI-powered bill splitting from receipt photos via Apple Cash; automated agentic password upgrades that navigate websites and change compromised credentials; one-tap message suggestions based on conversation context; Call Context that surfaces relevant info (like booking confirmation codes) during customer service calls; natural-language Shortcuts creation (vibe coding); intelligent Home app notification grouping; and AI-organized Safari tab groups. All features are designed to run on-device for privacy.
content.body_text:
iOS 27 embeds Apple Intelligence across Apple's native apps rather than concentrating AI into a single chatbot interface. Key features:

**Bill Splitting:** Take a photo of a restaurant receipt and Apple Intelligence extracts items, quantities, tip, and total. Users select their items, share requests via Messages, and pay via Apple Cash double-click.

**AI Password Update:** Identifies weak and breached passwords, then agentically navigates to websites and changes them to secure versions — no manual action needed.

**One-tap Messages Suggestions:** Context-aware suggestions appear in iMessage chats — add a friend's request to Reminders, share relevant Photos from library, create a Calendar event — all as single-tap actions.

**Call Context:** Surfaces relevant info from Mail (e.g., airline confirmation codes) directly on the call screen when you're calling a business. Runs on-device, no data shared with Apple.

**Vibe Coding Shortcuts:** Describe what you want your iPhone to do in plain language and Shortcuts builds the automation — text partner your ETA, turn porch lights on when DoorDash arrives, etc.

**Home App Intelligence:** Groups multiple smart home events (garage open, mailbox check, door enter) into one notification: 'Someone arrived and closed the garage.'

**Safari Tab Organizer:** Automatically groups open tabs by topic/project using Apple Intelligence, displayed at the top of the browser. Private, on-device processing.

tech_insights.impact_summary: Apple Intelligence in iOS 27 demonstrates the most comprehensive integration of AI into a consumer OS to date — embedding agentic capabilities across payments, security, communication, and automation.
actions_developer: Explore Apple Intelligence APIs for building contextual, device-level AI integrations in iOS 27 apps
Study Apple's on-device AI approach as a privacy-preserving alternative to cloud AI for mobile features
Review iOS 27 developer beta to prepare apps for integration with new AI-powered system features
actions_business: Consumer product teams: plan for iOS 27's AI features reshaping user expectations for app intelligence
Enterprise mobile teams: evaluate Call Context and Shortcuts for productivity workflow automation
Marketing/UX: anticipate users expecting 'ambient AI' that works without explicit prompting
